membership_no.text: ทะเบียนผู้กู้

root.sql: select sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no)as memname , sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no)as member_group , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no))as member_group_name , sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.other_loan_remark , sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.paid_amount , (select max(sc_fin_cheque_print.print_date) from sc_fin_cheque_print where sc_fin_cheque_print.paid_memno = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no )as print_date from sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid , sc_lon_m_loan_request where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.type_pay_money = 'CHQ' and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.other_loan_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = '30' --and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = '6530000018' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.seq_no
